author: anon-a7c6025f
content: Plan: (1) Add ureq for HTTP downloads. (2) Create download.rs that auto-fetches vocab.json, merges.txt, model.safetensors from HuggingFace into ~/.cache/ferrotorch-gpt2/ on first run with progress bars. (3) Rewrite main.rs so the default action is generate — 'cargo run --release -- "Hello world"' just works. (4) Positional args, sensible defaults, no mandatory flags.
